title: dysophylla stellata var. hainanensis
intro: Dysophylla stellata var. hainanensis, also known as Hainan dysophylla, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The plant is said to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Dysophylla stellata var. hainanensis are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
